name: Bubbmon
description: Although it looks like merely pale green bubbles at first glance, it is actually a Bubble Digimon that can move freely and express a plethora of facial expressions. Because its surface has not hardened yet, its defensive power is practically nonexistent and it is unsuited for combat. It produces tiny bubbles which proliferate infinitely from the pacifier-like part it holds in its mouth. This proliferation ability was being used for computer virus development at one point, but because its life force was too weak, that was fortunately never implemented. Although its life is fleeting, it is a lovable Digimon Baby that lives its life to the fullest. Its specialty is escaping while the intruder's movement is restricted by the adhesive bubbles it produces from within its body.
